name: Cash in a Flash Pawn
description_short: Cash in a Flash Pawn is a Denver-based pawn shop offering collateral-based loans and the purchase/sale of firearms, jewelry, tools, and watches with same-day funding.
description_long:
Cash in a Flash Pawn operates a pawn shop location in South Denver at 1842 S Parker Road, serving the Denver metropolitan area. The company specializes in the traditional pawn model: lending money in exchange for personal collateral (firearms, jewelry, watches, tools, and other goods), while also buying and selling used merchandise. Their South Denver location operates Monday through Friday 9 AM to 7 PM and Saturday 9 AM to 6 PM, closed Sundays.

The business offers collateral-based lending as their primary financial service, allowing customers to secure quick cash by pawning items. They also maintain an active inventory of merchandise available for purchase, with recent listings showing firearms ranging from $389.95 to $3,299.95, along with tools and other goods. Customers can either pawn items for short-term loans or sell items outright for cash. The company accepts a wide variety of collateral including firearms, jewelry, watches, tools, and other valuables.

What distinguishes Cash in a Flash Pawn from other lenders is their emphasis on fair appraisals and customer service. Multiple testimonials highlight staff friendliness, knowledgeable appraisals (particularly mentioned for watches), and flexibility in negotiations. Customer testimonials specifically name staff members (James, Kiedra, and a manager) as personable and helpful. One customer reports driving 30 minutes specifically to do business with this location, and another was pleasantly surprised by the value offered for items they assumed were worthless.

As a pawn shop, this business model carries inherent tradeoffs: while funding is immediate and no credit check is required, customers must surrender physical collateral and face the risk of losing items if unable to repay the loan within the agreed timeframe. The firearms inventory suggests this location caters to gun owners specifically. Pawn loans typically carry higher effective interest rates than traditional lending, though exact terms and rates are not disclosed on the website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day cash funding with no credit check required
Staff noted for friendliness and knowledgeable appraisals, particularly for jewelry and watches
Flexible negotiation and willingness to work with customers on loan terms
Wide variety of acceptable collateral including firearms, jewelry, watches, and tools
Transparent inventory with current listings and pricing displayed online
Convenient South Denver location with extended weekday hours (9 AM–7 PM)
Customers report fair valuations, with some receiving more than expected for items
cons: Requires surrender of physical possessions as collateral, creating risk of permanent loss if loan cannot be repaid
Website does not disclose interest rates, loan terms, or repayment periods, making cost comparison difficult
Limited hours: closed Sundays and only one confirmed location listed
Pawn loans typically carry higher effective interest rates than traditional personal loans or credit alternatives
No information provided about loan amounts, maximum loan-to-value ratios, or eligibility requirements
best_for: Gun owners and firearm enthusiasts needing immediate cash who can leverage firearms as collateral
Individuals with valuable jewelry or watches seeking quick appraisals and same-day cash without credit checks
People with limited credit history or poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional loans
Customers seeking to liquidate used tools or merchandise quickly
diagnosis: Cash in a Flash Pawn is best for individuals in the Denver area who own valuable items (firearms, jewelry, watches) and need immediate cash without a credit check or lengthy application process. The main caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering physical collateral and carry the risk of permanent loss if the loan cannot be repaid; customers should ensure they can meet repayment obligations and understand the actual interest rates and terms before pledging items.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans with same-day funding
Online inventory listing and pricing display
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
